title: Car Model, Collectible Super Sports Diecast Car, 1:60 Alloy Pull Back Racing Vehicle for Boys Girls Christmas and New Year Gifts - Pink Purple
features: 【Package includes】1 piece cars。A spectacular, faithful reproduction of a classic race car. Incredible realism where no detail is overlooked. Perfect to collect, display or simply play.

【High quality】Cars toys are made of durable alloy, with collision protection, environmental protection, and safety. These Cars toys have a cool appearance, strong toughness, and are durable against falling. After safety testing, children don't need to worry when playing.

【Benefits】When playing in car games with this car, your child will fully enjoy the necessary gaming time and develop basic skills that are crucial for their development: interactive, social, motor, and sensory motor skills.

【High quality materials】Precision manufacturing and craftmanship using heavy gauge Zinc alloy diecast metal and some high-quality ABS plastic components creates an authentic replica of this high performance, open wheel race car.
【Best Gift】An excellent gift or present for any automotive, racing and car enthusiast ages 3+.Every child loves racing very much. Can be used as cake decoration or model collection.
description: Product description Feature: -Immerse yourself in the world of speed, power, precision engineering, and motorsport glory with our meticulously crafted replicas. -Every car is a testament to the dedication of our artisans and the precision of our craftsmanship. -Crafted using a combination of high-grade metal alloy and premium quality plastic components, these models boast remarkable durability and structural integrity. ﻿ Specification: Material: Alloy Size: As show Color: As show ﻿ Package includes: 1 x Model Toy Car Safety Warning NO
